name: Gf Pumpkin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 350°F.
2 Sift dry ingredients together.
3 Cream shortening and sugar.
4 Add vanilla and pumpkin.
5 Add dry ingredients and nuts.
6 Beat until smooth.
7 Shape cookies into 1-inch balls and place on a greased cookie sheet.
8 Press flat with fork.
9 Bake for 9 to 12 minutes.
